auth.loginSubtitle: Plan your permaculture project step by step, guided by the 12 principles and nature patterns.
auth.loginFooter: Sign in using your existing Google account. No new password needed.

dashboard.title: My Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your permaculture design projects
dashboard.emptyDesc: Start by creating your first permaculture project. The assistant will guide you step by step through the design process.

chat.welcome: Hi! Let's start planning your project.
chat.welcomeSub: Type a message to begin the conversation.
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your message. Please try again.
chat.offlineQueued: 📡 You're offline. Your message was saved and will be sent automatically when you're back online.

project.createDesc: Give your permaculture project a name. You can change it later.

scope.title: Scope Document
scope.missingDesc: Complete the following stages for a complete planning document

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be erased.

offline.noConnection: No connection — your messages will be sent when you're back online
